channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: What changes to the CHIPS act could mean for AI growth and consumers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Even as he's vowed to push the United States ahead in artificial intelligence research, President Donald Trump's threats to alter federal government contracts with chipmakers and slap new tariffs on the semiconductor industry may put new speed bumps in front of the tech industry.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Why Musk may want to control OpenAI
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk’s bid to take control of OpenAI is fanning the flames of a longtime feud with co-founder and CEO Sam Altman and complicating the path forward for the popular creator of ChatGPT.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Apple finally lets you merge two Apple IDs—kinda. Here’s how
item.description: A few years ago, I chronicled the journey I went on to manually merge two Apple ID accounts into one.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: We're getting achingly closer to SOT-MRAM; the memory that could one day replace DRAM and NAND, but I can't see it happening soon
item.description: Researchers claim to have reached a goal that will allow SOT-MRAM to become reality sooner, just not too soon.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: How cyberscams are draining Americans wallets by the billions
item.description: Scams cost Americans an estimated $159 billion every year and average about $3,500 in losses per victim. The CyberGuy has advice to protect yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What is Starlink? How to get the satellite service for free on your phone with T-Mobile, plus everything you need to know
item.description: Starlink's satellite service is starting to hit the mainstream, with T-Mobile now offering it for free on compatible smartphones.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: OpenAI turns down Musk's takeover bid
item.description: OpenAI’s board of directors has turned down Elon Musk’s $97.4 billion bid to buy the nonprofit that controls the artificial intelligence company. “OpenAI is not for sale, and the board has unanimously rejected Mr.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: A partnership between Jigsaw and this Kentucky city could be the future of civic engagement
item.description: Bowling Green, Kentucky, is known for being the city from which Corvettes roll off the production lines, and for Fruit of the Loom underwear, which is headquartered there.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: OpenAI board unanimously rejects Elon Musk's $97.4 billion proposal
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — OpenAI says its board of directors has unanimously rejected a $97.4 billion takeover bid by Elon Musk. “OpenAI is not for sale, and the board has unanimously rejected Mr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: OpenAI board unanimously rejects Elon Musk's $97.4 billion proposal
item.description: OpenAI says its board of directors has unanimously rejected a $97.4 billion takeover bid by Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: This DARPA-backed startup banked $100 million for its energy-slashing analog chips
item.description: A young DARPA-backed startup with a fresh spin on a low-power computer chip has raised over $100 million in a Series B funding round, a sign of the wild appetite for more energy-efficient ways to build bigger and better AI.
item.dc:creator: Alex Pasternack, Fast Company

item.title: At 767 inches, this is the world's largest mobile LED monitor at almost half the size of a giant IMAX screen
item.description: The world’s largest mobile LED screen, JUMBO162, delivers 4K visuals with 374 high-brightness INFiLED panels.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Sorry – Netflix says it's actually not integrating with the Apple TV app
item.description: After Netflix started appearing in the Apple TV app for some users, the streamer says it was an inadvertent rollout and likely will never see a wide release.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Local history buffs are turning to Facebook to share memories of bygone eras
item.description: Social media has a reputation for capturing ephemeral thoughts and images, but around the world, people are using Facebook for a different purpose, setting up groups to record and share images and memories of the past.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok returns to Apple and Google app stores in the US
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — TikTok has returned to the app stores of Apple and Google in the U.S., after President Donald Trump delayed the enforcement of a TikTok ban. TikTok, which is operated by Chinese technology firm ByteDance, was removed from Apple and Google’s app stores on Jan.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Editorial: Musk bid for OpenAI exposes hypocrisy of business model
item.description: OpenAI masquerades as a nonprofit despite being founded on the theft of hard work by artists, academics and journalists.
item.dc:creator: Mercury News & East Bay Times editorial, The Mercury News

item.title: Elon Musk’s war on USAID is a war on reality
item.description: On January 29, President Donald Trump celebrated the latest victory in unelected billionaire Elon Musk’s crusade against “inefficiency” in the government: stopping $50 million from, according to Trump, “being sent to Gaza to buy condoms for Hamas.
item.dc:creator: Jay Willis, Fast Company

item.title: Palo Alto Networks firewall bug being exploited by threat actors: Report
item.description: Admins with firewalls from Palo Alto Networks should make sure the devices are fully patched and the management interface blocked from open internet access after the discovery this week of a zero-day login authentication bypass in the PAN-OS operating system.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Netflix releases trailer for new western series Ransom Canyon and it looks like an exciting mix of Yellowstone and Virgin River
item.description: Netflix unveils trailer for new western series Ransom Canyon and it looks perfect for fans of Yellowstone and Virgin River.
item.dc:creator: grace.morris@futurenet.com (Grace Morris), TechRadar

item.title: The NBA's tech summit turns 25 this year, and its return to the Bay Area is a full-circle moment
item.description: NBA Commissioner Adam Silver had no idea 25 years ago that the Tech Summit would turn into much of anything, much less one of the hottest tickets at All-Star weekend.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Grupo Piñero optimiza la experiencia del cliente a nivel tecnológico, operativo y participativo
item.description: Grupo Piñero optimiza la experiencia del cliente a nivel tecnológico, operativo y participativo. Se apoya para ello en la plataforma unificada de gestión de la experiencia del cliente de Sprinklr.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: IP Fabric expands network visibility, automation with platform update
item.description: As modern networking deployments across the cloud and edge become increasingly complex, it can be a non-trivial exercise for teams to get proper visibility.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Review: Zencoder has a vision for AI coding
item.description: Zencoder is an AI coding assistant with interfaces to Visual Studio Code and JetBrains IDEs. It is designed to help developers ship products faster, much like GitHub Copilot, Amazon Q Developer, and Tabnine.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: News influencers favored Trump over Harris during campaign, study finds
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Americans who followed news influencers during the presidential campaign were more likely to hear positive reports about Donald Trump than they were about Kamala Harris, a study has revealed.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Meta Layoffs to Begin Monday: 3,600 Jobs at Risk
item.description: Facebook parent company Meta set to lay off 3,600 employees, starting Monday, as CEO Mark Zuckerberg targets 'low-performers' in the workforce.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, NewsNation
